content.json:
# Trustee Matching Analytics

Comprehensive metrics tracking trustee matching performance across all 5 matching scenarios:
- **Story 1**: Auto-match with exact criteria
- **Story 2**: High confidence match (verification required)
- **Story 3**: Multiple matches - no clear winner
- **Story 4**: Exact match with inactive status
- **Story 5**: No match found

Powered by telemetry from `SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS` dataflow and `TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved` events.

---
## Overview Dashboard
Key performance indicators and scenario distribution across all trustee matching outcomes.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "TrusteeAutoMatchRate"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize CurrentRate = avg(value)
| extend Baseline = 90.0
| extend Status = iff(CurrentRate >= Baseline, "✅ On Target", "⚠️ Below Baseline")
| project Metric = "Auto-Match Rate", CurrentRate, Baseline, Status
content.title: Auto-Match Performance

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "DataflowDuration"
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize AvgDurationMs = avg(value)
| extend AvgDurationSeconds = AvgDurationMs / 1000
| project Metric = "Avg Processing Speed", AvgDurationSeconds
| extend Unit = "seconds"
content.title: Story 1: Auto-Match Processing Time

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend resolutionMs = todouble(customDimensions.resolutionMs)
| summarize MedianResolutionSeconds = percentile(resolutionMs, 50) / 1000
| project Metric = "Median Resolution Time", MedianResolutionSeconds
| extend Unit = "seconds"
content.title: Stories 2-5: Manual Verification Time

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS"
| where customDimensions.eventName == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    AutoMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.autoMatchCount"]),
    HighConfidence = todouble(customDimensions["details.highConfidenceMatchCount"]),
    MultipleMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.multipleMatchCount"]),
    ImperfectMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.imperfectMatchCount"]),
    NoMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.noMatchCount"])
| summarize 
    AutoMatchTotal = sum(AutoMatch),
    HighConfidenceTotal = sum(HighConfidence),
    MultipleMatchTotal = sum(MultipleMatch),
    ImperfectMatchTotal = sum(ImperfectMatch),
    NoMatchTotal = sum(NoMatch)
| extend Total = AutoMatchTotal + HighConfidenceTotal + MultipleMatchTotal + ImperfectMatchTotal + NoMatchTotal
| project 
    Story1_AutoMatch = round((AutoMatchTotal / Total) * 100, 1),
    Story2_HighConfidence = round((HighConfidenceTotal / Total) * 100, 1),
    Story3_MultipleMatch = round((MultipleMatchTotal / Total) * 100, 1),
    Story4_InactiveStatus = round((ImperfectMatchTotal / Total) * 100, 1),
    Story5_NoMatch = round((NoMatchTotal / Total) * 100, 1)
content.title: Scenario Distribution (%)

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS"
| where customDimensions.eventName == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    AutoMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.autoMatchCount"]),
    HighConfidence = todouble(customDimensions["details.highConfidenceMatchCount"]),
    MultipleMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.multipleMatchCount"]),
    ImperfectMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.imperfectMatchCount"]),
    NoMatch = todouble(customDimensions["details.noMatchCount"])
| summarize 
    Story1_AutoMatch = sum(AutoMatch),
    Story2_HighConfidence = sum(HighConfidence),
    Story3_MultipleMatch = sum(MultipleMatch),
    Story4_InactiveStatus = sum(ImperfectMatch),
    Story5_NoMatch = sum(NoMatch)
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Scenario Distribution Over Time

content.json:
---
## Time Metrics Deep Dive
Processing speed and resolution time analysis across all scenarios and resolution paths.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "DataflowDuration"
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend DurationSeconds = value / 1000
| summarize AvgDurationSeconds = avg(DurationSeconds) by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Story 1: Auto-Match Processing Speed Trend

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve" or customDimensions.action == "reject"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    resolutionPath = tostring(customDimensions.resolutionPath),
    resolutionMs = todouble(customDimensions.resolutionMs)
| extend 
    Story = case(
        mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "Story 2: High Confidence",
        mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "Story 3: Multiple Matches",
        mismatchReason == "INACTIVE_PERFECT_MATCH", "Story 4: Inactive Status",
        mismatchReason == "NO_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "Story 5: No Match",
        "Other"
    ),
    ResolutionPath = case(
        resolutionPath == "accepted", "Accepted",
        resolutionPath == "manual-search", "Manual Search",
        resolutionPath == "escalated", "Escalated",
        "Unknown"
    )
| where Story != "Other"
| summarize 
    MedianSeconds = percentile(resolutionMs, 50) / 1000,
    AvgSeconds = avg(resolutionMs) / 1000,
    Count = count()
    by Story, ResolutionPath
| order by Story asc, ResolutionPath asc
content.title: Stories 2-5: Resolution Time by Story and Path

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve" or customDimensions.action == "reject"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    resolutionMs = todouble(customDimensions.resolutionMs)
| extend 
    Story = case(
        mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "Story 2",
        mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "Story 3",
        mismatchReason == "INACTIVE_PERFECT_MATCH", "Story 4",
        mismatchReason == "NO_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "Story 5",
        "Other"
    )
| where Story != "Other"
| summarize MedianResolutionSeconds = percentile(resolutionMs, 50) / 1000 by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d), Story
| order by Day asc
content.title: Resolution Time Trend by Story

content.json:
---
## Accuracy & Quality Metrics
Tracking match accuracy, confirmation rates, and data quality trends.

### ⚠️ Match Accuracy (Metric 3.1) - Pending Decision

**Status**: This metric requires a decision on correction tracking approach:
- **Option A**: Manual audit/spot-checking (no new telemetry)
- **Option B**: System-tracked corrections (add `CorrectionDetected` trace)

Once decided, this section will display:
- Story 1 (Auto-match) accuracy vs 99.5% target
- Story 2 (High Confidence) accuracy vs 95% target
- Story 4 (Inactive Status) accuracy vs 98% target

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend wasPreselectedConfirmed = tobool(customDimensions.wasPreselectedConfirmed)
| summarize 
    Confirmed = countif(wasPreselectedConfirmed == true),
    Rejected = countif(wasPreselectedConfirmed == false)
| extend 
    Total = Confirmed + Rejected,
    ConfirmationRate = round((todouble(Confirmed) / todouble(Total)) * 100, 1)
| project ConfirmationRate, Confirmed, Rejected, Total
content.title: Story 2: Confirmation Rate

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.mismatchReason == "NO_TRUSTEE_MATCH"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    action = tostring(customDimensions.action),
    resolutionPath = tostring(customDimensions.resolutionPath)
| extend 
    Outcome = case(
        resolutionPath == "manual-search", "Manual Search Success",
        resolutionPath == "escalated" or action == "reject", "Escalated",
        "Other"
    )
| where Outcome != "Other"
| summarize Count = count() by Outcome
| extend Total = toscalar(sumif(Count, Outcome != "Other"))
| extend Percentage = round((todouble(Count) / todouble(Total)) * 100, 1)
| project Outcome, Count, Percentage
content.title: Story 5: Manual Search Success Rate

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "TrusteeAutoMatchRate"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize AutoMatchRate = avg(value) by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend Baseline = 90.0
| order by Day asc
content.title: Story 1: Data Quality Trend (Auto-Match Rate Over Time)

content.json:
---
## Behavior Analysis
Candidate selection patterns and distribution for Stories 2 & 3.

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    selectedCandidateRank = toint(customDimensions.selectedCandidateRank)
| where mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH" or mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH"
| extend 
    Story = iff(mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "Story 2: High Confidence", "Story 3: Multiple Matches"),
    Rank = case(
        selectedCandidateRank == 1, "1st",
        selectedCandidateRank == 2, "2nd",
        selectedCandidateRank == 3, "3rd",
        selectedCandidateRank >= 4, "4th+",
        "Unknown"
    )
| where Rank != "Unknown"
| summarize Count = count() by Story, Rank
| order by Story asc, Rank asc
content.title: Candidate Selection Pattern (Which Rank Was Selected?)

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    candidateCount = toint(customDimensions.candidateCount)
| where mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH" or mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH"
| extend Story = iff(mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "Story 2: High Confidence", "Story 3: Multiple Matches")
| summarize 
    MedianCount = percentile(candidateCount, 50),
    AvgCount = avg(candidateCount),
    MaxCount = max(candidateCount),
    TotalEvents = count()
    by Story
content.title: Candidate Count Statistics

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.eventName == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    candidateCount = toint(customDimensions.candidateCount)
| where mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH" or mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH"
| extend 
    Story = iff(mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "Story 2", "Story 3"),
    CandidateCountBucket = case(
        candidateCount == 1, "1",
        candidateCount == 2, "2",
        candidateCount == 3, "3",
        candidateCount == 4, "4",
        candidateCount >= 5, "5+",
        "Unknown"
    )
| where CandidateCountBucket != "Unknown"
| summarize Count = count() by Story, CandidateCountBucket
| order by Story asc, CandidateCountBucket asc
content.title: Candidate Count Distribution
